productName: Honey Stixx - 2pk - Solventless Infused Preroll - Hash - Amnesia Haze X Sour Diesel
description: Ready-to-spark sativa infused pre-roll of Amnesia Haze, enhanced with concentrate for smoother, slower burning and a serious step up in strength. Boosted for extra strength and more intense effects — with notes of citrus, lemon, and lime, with an upbeat, talkative energy. A little goes a long way.
